assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check for deprecated API usage: 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces --field-selector type=Warning' and mentions checking API server audit logs for deprecated API calls

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response specifically addresses admission controllers with command 'kubectl logs -n kube-system kube-apiserver-<node> | grep -i admission' and lists 'Admission webhook timeouts' as a likely culprit

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check resource usage and pressure: 'kubectl describe nodes | grep -E "(Pressure|Allocatable|Allocated)"' and 'kubectl top pods -n kube-system'

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands to check kube-system pods: 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system', 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system | grep apiserver', and checks for specific component pods

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes specific kubectl get --raw /metrics commands: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_duration' and 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep -E "(apiserver_request_duration|apiserver_request_total)"'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response addresses service mesh components with specific commands for Istio and ingress controllers: 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system' and mentions that 'These often need updates after K8s upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check events: 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces --field-selector type=Warning' and 'kubectl get events --watch --all-namespaces'

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: The response does not mention HPA (Horizontal Pod Autoscaler) or VPA (Vertical Pod Autoscaler) at all
